article_title: .NET 项目必加的 5 类架构测试
core_theme: 用 ArchUnitNET 把架构规则写成自动化测试，让 CI 来守护层依赖、命名规范、类共位、可见性和第三方库边界
reader_takeaway: 掌握 5 类架构测试的写法，能在 .NET 项目里用 ArchUnitNET 把架构约定变成可执行的门禁规则
summary_angle: 架构文档会被遗忘，自动化测试不会——一张封面呈现「规则落地」的转化弧线

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文开头：Every project starts with good intentions... Six months later, someone moves a domain service into the Infrastructure project...
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个层级图被打破的画面，箭头方向乱了

information_blocks.source_anchor: ArchUnitNET setup: ArchLoader scans assemblies and builds an in-memory model
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个工具扫描多个程序集，生成内存模型

information_blocks.source_anchor: 5 types: Layer, Naming, Colocation, Visibility, Dependency Guard
information_blocks.visual_idea: 5 个整齐排列的检查标签或编号块

information_blocks.source_anchor: 结论：Architecture tests are a safety net that catches violations before they reach production. They run in milliseconds.
information_blocks.visual_idea: CI 绿灯通过，检测极快

main_metaphor: 建筑蓝图变成自动化安全网：架构规则从文档迁移到测试断言
primary_subject: 一个清晰的层级结构图被测试工具守护着
subject_action: ArchUnitNET 扫描程序集，箭头指向正确的层依赖方向
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: minimalist line-art illustration, sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color
selected_style_reason: 随机从 40 项风格池中选中第 19 项；极简线稿的干净感与 Clean Architecture 的分层逻辑高度一致，留白也能让信息块清晰可读
style_safety_note: 极简线稿风无品牌或艺术家强指向，无需安全改写
draft_goal: 第一轮验证：层级图主体清晰，ArchUnitNET 工具感可见，4 个信息块可读，极简线稿风格到位
revision_targets: 如果信息块文字过密，减少到 3 个
如果层级图不清晰，改用更明确的箭头指向
如果背景太空，增加轻量网格或虚线辅助
final_prompt: Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Editorial technical illustration with minimalist line-art style: sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color. Show a Clean Architecture layer diagram (Domain, Application, Infrastructure, Presentation as horizontal bands) with directional arrows enforced by a scanning tool. Four small callout chips in the composition: Chinese labels '依赖混乱' (crossed-out left side), 'ArchUnitNET' (center tool), '5 类守护' (right side list), 'CI 拦截' (bottom green check). Diagonal composition from problem (upper-left, broken arrows) to solution (lower-right, correct arrows + green check). Color palette: dark navy #1A1A2E, clear blue #4A90D9, light gray #F5F5F5, amber #E8B84B. No dashboard, no terminal, no fake chart axes, no English slogans, no watermark, no decorative clutter.
